100% local · No login

Export Trade Republic account statements to Excel, CSV, or JSON

Turn your statements into structured tables - perfect for tax, analysis, or your personal finance overview. Processing runs entirely in your browser.

Find the statement in the app
Quick guide
New: Transaction Export Dashboard (beta) Got the Excel/CSV export from the TR app? Drop it into the new dashboard: MCC spending categories, FIFO P&L, dividend heatmap, subscription detection, 15+ charts – all local. Open dashboard Or: try the dashboard with demo data (no file needed)

Analysis starts right after selection. Once the page is loaded, you can use it completely offline.

LinkedIn jonathanpagel.com
  • No server upload - your data stays strictly local.
  • Export structured tables as Excel (XLSX), CSV, or JSON.
  • Get automatic summaries for cash, money market funds, and trading.
  • Process any number of PDFs in a row - ideal for full-year archives.

Get started in three steps

Most statements are analyzed in under a minute.

Step 1

Choose PDF

Upload your Trade Republic statement using the "Choose PDF" button.

Step 2

Wait for analysis

Processing starts automatically. You will see the progress for each page.

Step 3

Start export

Download structured data as Excel, CSV, or JSON and continue with charts.

Get the account statement in the Trade Republic app

Follow the app steps, save the statement as PDF, and upload it above to convert.

5 steps
  1. 1 Open profile

    In the "Wealth" tab, tap your profile photo in the top right to access your personal area.

  2. 2 Select the "Statements" section

    Scroll in your profile to "Statements" and tap the entry.

  3. 3 Open the account statement

    In the document list, tap "Account statement".

  4. 4 Choose a time range

    Select a range (e.g., month, 3 or 6 months) or tap "..." for a custom range.

  5. 5 Set start and end date

    Choose the desired range and tap "Next" to get the PDF statement, then export it here.

Please choose a PDF - analysis starts automatically.

Why this converter?

Optimized specifically for Trade Republic statements - from cash transactions to trading P&L.

  • Robust parser logic for the dynamic PDF layout, including plausibility checks.
  • Clean column names, euro formats, and clear data types for immediate analysis.
  • Interactive visualizations for cashflows, interest, and performance.
  • Use it as often as you like - no limits, no tracking, no hidden costs.

What data is detected?

  • Cash transactions: date, type, description, inflows, outflows, balances
  • Money market funds: fund name, ISIN, quantity, price, amounts
  • Trading P&L: buys, sells, and realized gains/losses
  • Transfers: deposits, withdrawals, and references

Trade Republic CSV export - overview

The converter turns your PDF statements into structured tables. Processing runs entirely in your browser - you can review the code anytime or use the page offline.

Export transactions

Capture all movements in your Trade Republic account: cash, interest, savings plans, and securities trading.

  • Save all activity as CSV or Excel
  • Prepare statement data for taxes or budget tracking
  • Track cashflows and portfolio movements transparently

Excel export for analysis

Use pivot tables, charts, or your own dashboards. All files work instantly in Excel, Google Sheets, or BI tools.

  • Clean columns and data types
  • Direct processing in your favorite tool
  • Optional JSON for automated workflows

Why export?

Trade Republic provides statements only as PDF. For tax filings, financial planning, or performance tracking, table formats are far more efficient - especially if you combine multiple statements.

Trading P&L included

The trading module shows realized gains and losses. If you optionally upload your portfolio PDF, you also get current values and unrealized P&L.

Feedback welcome

Want a new feature or need support for other brokers? Reach out via jonathanpagel.com.

Frequently asked questions

Short answers to the most important topics around Trade Republic export.

How do I export my Trade Republic transactions?

Choose your statement, wait for the automatic scan, and then use the export button for CSV, Excel, or JSON. You do not need to install or upload anything.

Can I get the Trade Republic statement on the web or PC?

No. Statements are only available in the mobile app. Trade Republic kontoauszug PC access is not available. Download the PDF there and then convert it here.

Does the tool work with older statements?

Yes, the PDF layout is detected automatically. You can process multiple documents in a row to build full-year overviews.

Which formats are available?

You get CSV, Excel (XLSX), and JSON. Choose the format that fits your workflow - all options are free.

Is the export really secure?

Yes. All data stays in your browser. You can even turn off Wi-Fi after the page loads - conversion works completely offline.

Are there any costs?

The export is permanently free. If the tool helps you, you can optionally donate in the support section.

Support & Updates

I continuously improve the converter - from new parsers to banking automation.

Latest bug fixes (last 2 months)

  • Descriptions with trailing "null" are now cleaned up automatically
  • Dates across 3 lines are now detected correctly
  • Last page is fully captured
  • Italian now works flawlessly
  • English is fully supported
  • Fix: English split headers "MONEY IN / MONEY OUT" are now detected correctly
  • Fix: Currency values in EU and US formats (e.g. 1.234,56 and 1,234.56) are now parsed correctly

Beta for banking automation

I am building a web app, an Excel add-in, and a Google Sheets add-on that fetch transactions from many European banks hourly - including visualizations, pivots, and automations.

Sounds interesting? Join the beta.

Trade Republic CSV export - how it works

Our free Trade Republic CSV export converter turns your PDF account statements into Excel, CSV, or JSON in just a few clicks. The entire process runs directly in your browser - no cloud uploads, no data sharing, no signup required. If you're looking for trade republic pdf to csv, this is exactly what the tool delivers.

Export Trade Republic transactions - all options

With our tool you can export Trade Republic transactions and your account activity. Whether you need a CSV export or Excel export, the converter supports all common formats for your financial analysis.

Which data can I export?

  • All transactions as CSV or Excel
  • Income and expenses in a structured export
  • Statement data prepared for tax advisors
  • Portfolio movements analyzed in detail
  • Money market fund activity evaluated separately

Trade Republic Excel export - professional financial analysis

The Trade Republic Excel export is ideal for anyone who wants to analyze financial data professionally. Trade Republic does not provide a direct export of your transactions into tabular formats. For financial planning, tax filings, or portfolio analysis, Excel and CSV files are often essential. That is where our converter comes in.

Why export Trade Republic data?

  • Optimize tax advice: Structured data for efficient processing
  • Portfolio analysis: Detailed evaluation of your investments
  • Categorize spending: Better overview of inflows and outflows
  • Keep a household budget: Integrate into your overall financial planning

Guide: export Trade Republic transactions

Exporting Trade Republic activity has never been easier. Follow this step-by-step guide:

How the converter works - in three simple steps:

  1. Choose PDF (no upload required) - select your Trade Republic statement as a PDF (all data stays local in your browser)
  2. Analyze - with one click, all transaction data is extracted and structured automatically
  3. Export - save the results as Excel, CSV, or JSON on your device

How to find your Trade Republic account statement

You can easily download the statement in the Trade Republic app:

  1. Open the Trade Republic app on your smartphone
  2. Tap your profile icon in the bottom right (or the "Profile" menu item)
  3. Scroll down to the "Documents" or "More" section
  4. Tap "Statements" or "Account statements"
  5. Select the desired time range and download the PDF
  6. Transfer the PDF to your computer or use the tool directly on your mobile device

What makes this Trade Republic export converter special?

  • 100% local processing: Your sensitive financial data never leaves your browser
  • Intelligent extraction: Detects both cash transactions and money market fund activity
  • No registration: No accounts, no email address, no user profiles - just use it
  • Multiple export formats: CSV export, Excel export, or JSON - ideal for different use cases
  • Clear visualization: Clean charts give you an instant overview of your financial movements
  • Transparent and free: No hidden fees, no ads, no usage limits

Benefits of export for your financial management

With the exported data from the Trade Republic CSV export you can do much more than with a static PDF:

  • Optimize tax advice: Provide your tax advisor with structured data for faster processing
  • Run portfolio analysis: Import transactions into analysis tools for deeper insights
  • Export expenses: Sort and group inflows and outflows by your own criteria
  • Create your own reports: Use Excel formulas and pivot tables for custom reporting
  • Keep a household budget: Integrate Trade Republic transactions into your overall planning

Supported data formats for Trade Republic export

The converter extracts all key information from your Trade Republic statements:

  • Cash transactions: date, transaction type, description, inflow, outflow, balance
  • Money market funds (MMF): date, transaction type, fund name, ISIN, quantity, price, amount
  • Securities trading: buy and sell details with product identifier and amounts
  • Deposits and withdrawals: all transfers with full reference information

Feedback and support

If you run into problems, have suggestions, or want the tool adapted for other brokers, contact me via jonathanpagel.com. I would also appreciate a coffee: buy me a coffee.

Frequently asked questions - Trade Republic export

How can I export Trade Republic transactions?

Upload your PDF statement and click "Extract transactions". All transactions are detected automatically and can be exported as CSV or Excel. The entire Trade Republic export process takes only a few seconds.

Can I export my Trade Republic activity?

Yes, the converter detects all income and expenses from your statement and prepares them for export. You can export individual transactions or all activity.

Which formats does the Trade Republic CSV export support?

The converter supports CSV export, Excel export (XLSX), and JSON. All formats are compatible with common analysis tools and spreadsheets.

Is the tool really completely free?

Yes, usage is 100% free with no restrictions. There is no premium version or hidden features for the Trade Republic export.

Is it safe to upload my statements?

Absolutely. All processing happens locally in your browser. The PDFs and their content are never transmitted to a server. You can even inspect the source code of this page. Or just turn off Wi-Fi, upload the statement, and convert it - once the page is loaded, it does not need the internet.

Can I convert historical statements as well?

Yes, the tool works with all Trade Republic statements, regardless of date. You can even upload multiple Trade Republic PDF statements in a row to convert them to Excel or CSV and export them.

Can I export all Trade Republic transactions at once?

Yes, if you have multiple statements you can process them one after another and export all transactions. The tool automatically detects all movements in your account.

Does the tool support converting other PDFs besides Trade Republic?

No, this converter is optimized specifically for converting Trade Republic statements to Excel and CSV and currently only supports exporting data from Trade Republic PDFs.

Do I need to download the Trade Republic Excel/CSV export?

The data extracted from your Trade Republic statement is displayed in a clear table on this page. For further processing, we recommend exporting as Excel, CSV, or JSON.

Can I export my Trade Republic expenses?

Yes, all expenses and income are captured during export. You can export your Trade Republic expenses and analyze them further in Excel or other programs.
